hypothesis: If a stereochemistry-aware equivariant diffusion model (LoQI) is trained on AIMNet2/CPCM-optimized ChEMBL3D conformers, then it will generate low-energy, stereochemically correct conformers that preserve topology and achieve lower relaxation energies and RMSDs to reference structures than baseline methods across diverse drug-like molecules because explicit chirality/E–Z graph augmentations and equivariant diffusion learn the underlying 3D energy landscape.
